productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Black & White Tunic
description: Style Note This super soft black and white tunic, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous tunic. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Black and white printed tunic that has a boat neckline, three quarter raglan sleeves with a broad elasticated band on the cuffs and a tie-up at the waist Material and Care 100% polyester with a 100% cotton trim Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
